text.title: Action Item Carryover Tracker Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: ≥1 recurring meeting generates action items AND review cadence ≥weekly?

branch.question: Owner convention exists AND log location identifiable?
